title: Preview-first parser-derived C++ code generation
summary: C++ generation commands derive enums, fields, functions, namespaces, and target headers from Tree-sitter, render the result through the real frontend, and require an explicit apply action.
details: DansCppGenerate opens a chooser; dedicated commands generate enum to_string, struct to_string, Validity/validity/is_valid/to_string, a current-function header declaration, or a sibling header draft.

Validity follows the owner's u8 zero-is-valid convention. It recursively emits checks only for syntactically inferable nested structs/configs and leaves scalar/domain predicates as an explicit comment rather than inventing them.

Enum and validity string conversion use the observed dans-vk2 with_name, include_name, using-enum, switch, and unreachable pattern; generated functions are inline so adjacent header insertion is ODR-safe.

Header declaration projection preserves the implementation signature while removing its body and constructor initializer. Qualified methods are inserted into a matching class body after an explicit public/protected/private choice; free functions are reopened in their namespace.
A header draft copies non-self includes, emits safe type forward declarations and non-static/non-template free-function declarations, and never replaces a non-empty existing header.
The preview's a mapping applies to a buffer left modified for review, y copies, and q closes. No command silently writes a project file to disk.

provenance.note: Owner requested header projection, header creation, Validity/is_valid/to_string, and enum to_string tooling.
The generator convention was reconstructed from the owner's current implementation without writing to that repository.
Current parser, generators, preview, and application behavior.

evidence.claim: Field/enum extraction, compiling nested validity output, declarations, constructor projection, header drafts, member insertion/duplicate rejection, and explicit preview apply are pinned.

questions: How do I generate validity and string conversion for a struct?
How does a function implementation get declared in its header?
Will header generation overwrite an existing file?

last_verified.method: Read-only convention audit plus parser/generator and real preview-apply tests.
